backend/main.mo: Main backend actor that includes blob storage mixin and manages contact form submissions with CRUD operations (submit, query by project type/email, delete by email+timestamp).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four features related to auditing, verifying, fixing, and enhancing error logging for 120 gallery images in the Portfolio component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files including components, hooks, and configuration files with details about styling, animations, and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including background, foreground, primary, secondary, and component-specific colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Casa Di Vida application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page application with Navigation, Hero, Services, Portfolio, About, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component with asymmetric 60/40 layout displaying company philosophy and four core values (Passion, Excellence, Collaboration, Innovation) with scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact form component with validation, toast notifications, and form submission handling using React Query mutation hook, plus contact information display with icons.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying brand logo, quick navigation links, social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn), copyright notice, and a credit link to caffeine.ai with dynamic app identifier.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component with full-screen background image, Casa Di Vida branding, tagline, call-to-action buttons for portfolio and contact, and animated scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu links, mobile sheet menu, scroll-based styling changes, and smooth scrolling to sections with active section highlighting.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio gallery component with category filtering (residential, commercial, before-after), image grid display with error handling, and dynamically generated project data from numbered asset files.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying six interior design service cards (space planning, color consultation, furniture selection, full room design, lighting design, styling) with icons, titles, and descriptions using scroll animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor instance using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting contact form data to the backend actor, with automatic query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook using IntersectionObserver to trigger scroll-based animations with configurable threshold and rootMargin, respecting prefers-reduced-motion preferences.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for a luxury interior design theme using OKLCH color space, including warm browns, creams, and terracotta accents, plus scroll animation utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom colors using OKLCH, typography fonts (Inter, Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond), elegant shadows, and custom animations for an interior design aesthetic.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Casa Di Vida interior design website with 120 gallery images across three sections (residential, commercial, before/after), noting all images are currently failing to load.
